## DEMENTIA CARE

# Dementia Nurse   Consulting

## Specialist Support for Dementia Care

Compassionate, personalised support for people living with dementia, their families, carers, and care providers across East Gippsland.

[Complete Online Referral](https://innerpeace.vision/dementia-care/#online-referral)

[Contact Dementia Care](https://innerpeace.vision/dementia-care/#ips-contact)

![](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Dementia_Nurse_Consulting-819x1024.png)

## Overview

## Clear, practical dementia support with a human centre.

Working alongside individuals, families, carers, and providers, we deliver person-centred dementia support that promotes dignity, safety, wellbeing, and meaningful connection to home and community.

- Person-centred
- Compassionate
- Practical
- Aligned with aged care standards

## Support & Services

## Simple support pathways for families, referrers, and care teams.

The page has been simplified so visitors can quickly understand who the service supports, how Inner Peace can help, and how to complete a referral online.

### Who We Support

- People living with dementia at all stages
- Support at Home (SaH) recipients
- Families and carers
- Home care recipients
- Aged care and community providers

### How We Help

- Personalised care planning
- Family and carer guidance
- Changed behaviour support and dementia strategies
- Support for home care and aged care providers
- Improving wellbeing, independence and quality of life

## Specialist Clinical Services

## Specialist dementia care translated into practical action.

## Behaviour Assessment & Support

Assessment of behaviour with practical strategies to reduce distress and improve care.

## Individualised Care Planning

Development and review of care plans responsive to changing needs.

## Family & Carer Support

Education, guidance, and practical tools for families and informal carers.

## Provider & Workforce Consultation

Clinical consultation to strengthen capability and consistency of care.

## Quality of Life Strategies

Support focused on meaningful engagement, wellbeing, independence, identity, and purpose.

## Assessment & Ongoing Support

Initial cognitive assessment, geriatric assessment, diagnosis support, and ongoing support.

## Online Referral Form

## Complete the form electronically.

This online form is designed so doctors, referrers, families, and providers can complete the referral without needing to download, print, or scan paperwork.

Referral Details


Provider name

SAH level

Referrer name

Referrer phone

Referrer email

Client / Patient Details


Title

Gender

Date of birth

Given names

Surname

Phone

Email

Address

Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander background?

YesNoPrefer not to say

Medicare number / expiry

Pension / DVA card details

Reason for Referral


What are you hoping to get out of this assessment?

Current concerns or relevant notes

Contacts & Care Team


Next of kin name

Next of kin phone/email

Emergency contact name

Emergency phone/email

Medical treatment decision maker

Decision maker contact

General practitioner

GP contact details

Other health/community professionals involved

Home Visit Risk Assessment


Are the patient and carer agreeable to a home visit?

Please selectYesNoNot applicable

Is there somewhere to park?

Please selectYesNoUnsure

Are there pets in the house?

Please selectYesNo

Does anyone smoke in the house?

Please selectYesNo

Any infectious diseases present?

Please selectYesNoUnsure

Any firearms or weapons in the home?

Please selectYesNoUnsure

Risk assessment notes / access information

**Privacy notice:**

The information submitted through this form may include personal and health information. It will be used only for referral, assessment, care planning, and relevant communication purposes. Submissions are sent to the designated Inner Peace Vision email addresses and are not intended to be used as a full clinical document sharing system.


Consent


I confirm consent has been provided to collect and use the personal and health information supplied for the purpose of assessment, referral, care planning, and relevant communication.

I consent to Inner Peace Services contacting relevant health/community professionals involved in care where appropriate.

I confirm the information provided is accurate to the best of my knowledge.

## Contact

## Speak with the Dementia Care team.

## Inner Peace Services

Specialist support for dementia care across East Gippsland.
